notes: Official video_mask_tuple returns target_video as pixel_values, input_video as input_condition, quantized quadmask as mask, and text. Wrapper maps condition_path to condition, winner_path to target_video, and quadmask_0_path to dataset_mask.
Both quantize to four values 0/63/127/255 using the same threshold bands, with wrapper operating after decoding/resizing.

Official dataset flips mask_video with 255-mask_video and train loop flips again with mask=1-mask before VAE mask encoding. Wrapper decodes the stored quadmask and applies train_loop_mask=1-dataset_mask before VAE mask encoding, matching the train-loop-facing semantics.
Both rearrange video tensors to B,C,F,H,W, sample from VAE encode, multiply by vae.config.scaling_factor, and rearrange latents to B,F,C,H,W.

Both encode mask and condition/reference video through VAE and concatenate them before scaling/rearrange. Wrapper uses condition_latents directly and does not model t2v_flag random dropout or add_noise_to_reference_video branch; Exp50 official config path uses VOID pass1 inpaint with use_vae_mask.
Official samples random noise and idx_sampling timesteps. Wrapper fixes seed and timestep for deterministic zero-gap/preference diagnostics, then calls scheduler.add_noise identically.
Both use noise for epsilon and scheduler.get_velocity(latents, noise, timesteps) for v_prediction. Loaded scheduler reports v_prediction in Exp50/Exp51.
Both pass noisy latents, prompt embeddings, timesteps, rotary embeddings, return_dict=False, and inpaint_latents into CogVideoXTransformer3DModel.
Both compute F.mse_loss(noise_pred.float(), target.float(), reduction='mean') for SFT parity.
Official deepspeed is used by accelerate launcher/training-state orchestration. The core forward path does not require deepspeed for a one-batch single-process diagnostic.
